summary.prompt: Build me a plugin for MiraboxSpace StreamDock VSD N4 Pro that Utilizes the Touchbar Mode to display the currently playing song and artist from Apple Music Desktop Application. The plugin should take up the entire length of the VSD N4 Pro touch bar for display.
summary.raw_verdict: pass (CV verified production-fidelity PNV.1; 28/28 harness assertions; Critic v2 clean)

deliverable_manifest.Author: Auto Builder
deliverable_manifest.Description: Displays the currently playing song and artist from the Apple Music app for Windows (Microsoft Store preview) on the StreamDock VSD N4 Pro touch bar.
deliverable_manifest.Name: Apple Music Now Playing

ledger.restatement: A StreamDock VSD N4 Pro plugin that uses the device's Touchbar Mode (the contiguous wide-display strip) to show the currently playing song and artist from the Apple Music desktop application, occupying the full length of the touch bar.

sections.charter_excerpt: Define the on-disk shape of the deliverable: the .sdPlugin folder name, the manifest.json with all required SDK-v2 keys (Name, Version, Author, Description mentioning Windows + Apple Music for Windows, Icon, Category, CategoryIcon, OS arra…
sections.acceptance_excerpt: The plugin folder exists at the canonical reverse-DNS name. manifest.json parses as JSON and contains all SDK-v2 required keys with values consistent with the Windows-only, single-Encoder-action, Apple-Music-for-Windows-now-playing intent.…

sections.acceptance_excerpt: When launched with valid SDK CLI args against a mock WebSocket host, the plugin process connects, sends a registerPlugin frame with the correct event name and uuid, and is willing to receive events. willAppear adds the context to an in-mem…

sections.charter_excerpt: Implement the orchestration loop that, for each currently appearing action context, periodically asks the music-source module (S5) for the current track and translates the result into a setFeedback payload sent via S3's sendFeedback helper…
sections.acceptance_excerpt: When at least one context is appearing and the music-source module returns {title:'X', artist:'Y'}, S3's sendFeedback is called with {title:'X', artist:'Y'} for that context within one poll interval. When the music-source returns null, sen…

events.summary: User installation failed: FAIL — wrong OS.** Plugin did not appear in the user's VSD Craft side panel because Discovery defaulted IP1 (host OS) to macOS while the user is on Windows. Di…
events.verbatim_excerpt: **Verdict on user installation (v1):** **FAIL — wrong OS.** Plugin did not appear in the user's VSD Craft side panel because Discovery defaulted IP1 (host OS) to macOS while the user is on Windows. Discovery had Windows-path evidence (`C:\Users\mondr\...`) in its execution context and did not consult it. TD then accepted the Discovery default without exercising the quick-reasoning rubric (which would have failed 3/4 conditions on IP1 and mandated a Researcher dispatch). See `root-cause-analysis…
Discovery's charter: "*simplest-within-reason*: pick the simplest defensible interpretation that doesn't contradict the prompt."

events.summary: Failure mode: Discovery-default-accepted as a rubric bypass
events.verbatim_excerpt:
TD's quick-reasoning rubric (all four must hold to skip Researcher dispatch):
- Well-known canonical answers in training data
- Both branches have similar implementation complexity
- Choice introduces no new external dependencies
- Choice is easily reversible
